Package io.github.imetaxas.realitycheck

Class SoftChecks

java.lang.Object
io.github.imetaxas.realitycheck.SoftChecks
public final class SoftChecks extends Object
Soft assertion entry point. Collects all failures within the block and reports them together when assertAll() is called.

Used via Reality.checkAll(softly -> { ... }) or instantiated directly.

See Also:
  • Reality.checkAll(java.util.function.Consumer)

    • assertAll

      public void assertAll()
      Reports all collected failures. Called automatically by Reality.checkAll().
